summary: Created tsconfig.json with ES2022 target, NodeNext module/moduleResolution, strict mode, dist/ outDir, and **/* include. Created src/index.ts with export {} as empty project marker.
Created jest.config.js with @swc/jest transform scoped to tests/unit/**/*.test.ts. Added test:unit script to package.json. Created passing sanity test at tests/unit/setup.test.ts.

Created playwright.config.ts with headless Chromium, baseURL http://localhost:3000, testDir ./tests/e2e. Created sanity test at tests/e2e/setup.spec.ts navigating to about:blank and asserting empty title. Added test:e2e script and updated test script to run test:unit && test:e2e sequentially.

task: Wire up a root test script
summary: No changes required. The package.json 'test' script was already set to 'npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e' from the previous Playwright configuration cycle.

task: Update Playwright configuration with webServer block
summary: Added webServer configuration to playwright.config.ts with command 'npm start' and url 'http://localhost:3000' to enable automatic server startup during E2E tests.

No code files were modified - the HTML and CSS files were already created. Ran npm install to install the serve dependency which was blocking the webServer startup. Linting and type checking both passed. Implementation ready for test validation.

task: Update Homepage - Replace with Generate button
summary: Replaced Hello World content with a large button element. Added button with type='button' and data-testid='generate-btn' containing text 'Generate'. Updated CSS with button styling (24px font-size, 12px 24px padding) for large appearance. Resolved linting issue requiring explicit button type attribute.

Added color display div with data-testid='color-value' that's initially hidden. Implemented generateHexColor() function to create random hex colors (#RRGGBB format). Implemented updateColor() to display color, make element visible, and set body background color. Added event listener to Generate button. Styled color display as bold with font-weight: bold and initial display: none.

Added copy button with emoji (📋) positioned to the right of hex color value. Implemented copyToClipboard() function using navigator.clipboard.writeText() to copy hex color with leading # to clipboard. Added CSS flexbox layout to color-container for side-by-side positioning. Copy button is hidden initially and displayed when color is generated. All lint and type checks passed.
